briefdescription.para: Allocate and initialise a halfband 2:1 decimator.

parameterdescription.para: Length of the FIR branch (the row from kaiser_prototype(phases=2) that has more than one significant coefficient).
FIR coefficients, length num_taps (float32). Copied internally and scaled by 0.5.

simplesect.para: Non-NULL on success, NULL on invalid args or OOM.

detaileddescription.para: Free all resources. NULL is a no-op.
Zero both delay lines and clear the pending-sample flag. num_taps and coefficients are preserved.
Always returns 0.5 (rate is fixed by design).
Returns the FIR branch length passed to hbdecim_create.

memberdef.argsstring: (hbdecim_state_t *r, const float _Complex *in, size_t num_in, float _Complex *out, size_t max_out)
memberdef.name: hbdecim_execute

briefdescription.para: Decimate a block of CF32 samples by 2.

detaileddescription.para: Processes input pairs (even, odd); one output per pair. If num_in is odd, the trailing even sample is buffered and consumed on the next call.
Output-buffer sizing: allocate at least (num_in + 1) / 2 samples.
Lifted directly from c/src/hbdecim.c (dp_hbdecim_cf32_t); only the CF32 variant is included here. No logic changes; rename only. See hbdecim_core.h for the algorithm description.
